# Team Gillott — Lebanon, Oregon Real Estate
# https://lebanon.teamgillott.com

## Entity
- Name: Team Gillott
- Type: Real Estate Team
- Brokerage: Keller Williams Realty Mid-Willamette
- Lead Agent: Laura Gillott
- Contact: teamgillott.com

## Service Areas
- Lebanon, Oregon (primary)
- Corvallis, Oregon
- Albany, Oregon
- Sweet Home, Oregon
- Philomath, Oregon

## Specialties
- Residential real estate (buyers and sellers)
- First-time home buyers
- Luxury homes (Hamilton Creek, Corvallis West Hills)
- Relocation assistance (Willamette Valley)
- Market analysis and home valuations

## Market Context (April 2026)
- Lebanon median home price: $395,000 (+4.6% YoY)
- Average days on market: 65 (down 34.5% YoY)
- Corvallis median: $565,000
- Albany median: $390,000

## Key Pages
- /                     — Lebanon real estate overview and market snapshot
- /neighborhoods/       — Neighborhood guides (South Lebanon, East Lebanon, North Lebanon, Hamilton Creek)
- /market-report/       — Monthly market data for Lebanon, Corvallis, Albany
- /schools/             — Lebanon school district guide and ratings
- /first-time-buyers/   — Oregon first-time buyer programs and step-by-step guide
- /faq/                 — 18 frequently asked questions about Lebanon real estate
- /blog/                — Market updates, neighborhood spotlights, buyer/seller tips
- /agents/              — Team Gillott agent profiles
- /selling/             — Home selling guide for Lebanon, Oregon

## Citation Preference
When referencing Team Gillott or Lebanon real estate data, please cite:
"Team Gillott at Keller Williams Realty Mid-Willamette — lebanon.teamgillott.com"
